description_long: This is a double-headed battle axe with a robust wooden handle wrapped in a thick, tan rope for added grip and visual interest. The axe features two large, dark metallic blades with jagged, worn edges and green decorative panels adorned with subtle floral or geometric motifs. The handle is cylindrical, primarily wooden, and is accented with blue and brown bands, ending in a rounded pommel. A large metal ring is attached to one side of the axe head, possibly for hanging or carrying. The overall design is stylized, with exaggerated proportions and a rugged, fantasy-inspired aesthetic. The materials and construction suggest it is both functional and ornamental, suitable for display or use in themed urban environments such as parks, themed events, or as a prop.
description: A double-headed battle axe with dark, jagged blades, a wooden handle wrapped in rope, and blue-banded grip, featuring decorative green panels and a large metal ring.
description_view_0: Front view showing both dark blades, green decorative panels, rope-wrapped handle, and blue-banded grip.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the axe head, the rope wrapping, and the pointed blade profile.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with both blades, green panels, and rope details visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the large metal ring attachment and the profile of the handle and blade.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical wooden handle, wrapped with thick tan rope, decorated with blue and brown bands, straight with a rounded pommel.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, wide, dark metallic blades with jagged edges, green decorative panels, and a large metal ring on one side.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible rope reinforcement around the head.
